# uptimekuma_notification_sevenio (Resource)

Seven.io SMS notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_sevenio" "example" {
  name      = "Seven.io SMS Notification"
  is_active = true
  api_key   = "your_sevenio_api_key"
  sender    = "+491234567890"
  to        = "+491111111111"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) Seven.io API key for authentication
- `name` (String) Notification name
- `sender` (String) Sender name or phone number
- `to` (String) Recipient phone number

### Optional

- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
